steps.t: Meneldir is inside Crossway House. You should return to Meneldir and tell him what you learned from Aberthol.
Meneldir suggested that you and your companions hunt the animals of Sedgemead for meat, collect firewood for the town braziers, and tell the folk of H…
Braziers can be found in front of Crossway House in the town of Herne, waiting for you and your companions to fill them with firewood. Meneldir hopes …
Meneldir is inside Crossway House, waiting to hear about the town's preparations for the approaching night.
Meneldir stands outside Crossway House after the events of the long night.
